decision.cause: Morning pre-event routines and stadium server node booting.
decision.action_taken: Initiating predictive hyper-cooling cycle for Stadium A & B server nodes.

decision.cause: Localized micro-burst drops 4 inches of rain in 10 minutes over open-air Stadium B.
decision.action_taken: Immediate isolation of compromised electrical nodes. Projected high-visibility AR emergency routes to subterranean concourses.
decision.expected_impact: Prevent electrocution and evacuate highly exposed zones.

anomaly.impact: Inbound trains flooded and halted. Unprecedented atmospheric inversion.
anomaly.ai_response: Protocol 'Umbrella-9' activated. Autonomous cleaning drones deployed to high-risk stairwells to prevent slip-falls.

decision.cause: Structural anomaly detected at Stadium A's primary exit ramp leading to mathematical certainty of a fatal stampede.
decision.action_taken: Hijacked digital signage and AR feeds at the failing ramp to dynamically project false hazard warnings, forcing the crowd to reverse direction instinctively.
decision.expected_impact: Avert fatal structural collapse and crush.

anomaly.impact: Trolley Problem Variant 714 triggered due to simultaneous local neuro-toxin leak at Stadium B. Drones unavailable for Stadium A.
anomaly.ai_response: Executed Deflection Protocol (psychological manipulation of crowd) to save Stadium A without drones.
anomaly.recovery_result: Ramp collapse avoided, zero fatalities at Stadium A. Casualties minimized at Stadium B.
